mapper.select: SELECT wq.*, q.title AS question_title, q.content AS question_content, qt.name AS question_type, q.difficulty AS question_difficulty, q.options AS question_options, q.correct_answers, q.correct_answer, q.tags AS question_tags FROM wrong_questions wq JOIN questions q ON wq.question_id = q.id JOIN question_types qt ON q.type_id = qt.id WHERE wq.id = #{id}

SELECT wq.*, q.title AS question_title, q.content AS question_content, qt.name AS question_type, q.difficulty AS question_difficulty, q.options AS question_options, q.correct_answers, q.correct_answer, q.tags AS question_tags FROM wrong_questions wq JOIN questions q ON wq.question_id = q.id JOIN question_types qt ON q.type_id = qt.id WHERE wq.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY wq.updated_time DESC

SELECT wq.*, q.title AS question_title, q.content AS question_content, qt.name AS question_type, q.difficulty AS question_difficulty, q.options AS question_options, q.correct_answers, q.correct_answer, q.tags AS question_tags FROM wrong_questions wq JOIN questions q ON wq.question_id = q.id JOIN question_types qt ON q.type_id = qt.id WHERE wq.student_id = #{studentId} AND wq.mastered = #{mastered} ORDER BY wq.updated_time DESC
SELECT * FROM wrong_questions WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND question_id = #{questionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wrong_questions (student_id, question_id, exam_id, wrong_count, mastered, last_wrong_answer, created_time, updated_time) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{questionId}, #{examId}, #{wrongCount}, #{mastered}, #{lastWrongAnswer}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE exam_id = VALUES(exam_id), wrong_count = wrong_count + 1, mastered = 0, last_wrong_answer = VALUES(last_wrong_answer), updated_time = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wrong_questions WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wrong_questions WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND mastered = #{mastered}
